Article Title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stuns Bumrah, does what Samson, Abhishek, Gill couldn’t in T20s
Article Text:
Vaibhav Suryavanshi vs Jasprit Bumrah

A Fearless First Encounter



A Rare Feat Against Bumrah

Explosive hitters against Jasprit Bumrah in T20 cricket



Players Innings Runs 4s 6s Shubman Gill 8 34 4 0 Nicholas Pooran 6 17 2 0 Abhishek Sharma 5 17 1 0 Sanju Samson 13 64 9 0 Travis Head 8 57 8 0

In the much-anticipated clash between Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Jasprit Bumrah , the 15-year-old achieved what even stars like Abhishek Sharma , Sanju Samson, Shubman Gill , Nicholas Pooran , and Travis Head haven’t managed in T20 cricket against the formidable Bumrah.In a moment that perfectly captured the fearless spirit of youth, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi announced a jaw-dropping display against none other than Jasprit Bumrah during the IPL clash between Rajasthan Royals and Mumbai Indians in Guwahati. The contest, reduced to an 11-overs-a-side affair due to rain, still managed to deliver one of the most talked-about moments of the season, a teenager taking on arguably the world’s best fast bowler without hesitation.Facing Bumrah for the very first time in the Indian Premier League, Sooryavanshi wasted no time in making an impact. The young left-hander smashed the very first ball he faced from the Indian pace spearhead straight over long-on for a stunning six. The audacity of the shot even drew a smile from BumrahAfter rotating strike briefly with opening partner Yashasvi Jaiswal, Sooryavanshi once again took on Bumrah on the 4th ball of same over.Anticipating a slower delivery, he picked it early and launched it into the midwicket stands, marking two sixes. Sooryavanshi’s innings was short but electrifying. He scored a blistering 39 off just 14 balls before being dismissed by Shardul Thakur, caught in the deep.What makes this performance even more extraordinary is the elite company it disrupts. Top T20 stars such as Sanju Samson, Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Shubman Gill, and Nicholas Pooran, all renowned for their explosive batting, have never managed to hit a single six off Bumrah in T20 cricket. Yet, a 15-year-old newcomer not only cleared the ropes but did it twice in a single over.These T20 stars are renowned for their explosive hitting, yet 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi outclassed Jasprit Bumrah in their very first meeting, achieving what many established names have not. The comparison becomes even more striking considering that players like Shubman Gill, Abhishek Sharma, and Sanju Samson have faced Bumrah extensively in the nets and over the years, yet have never managed to hit him for a six in T20 cricket. Despite being known for their ability to clear the ropes with ease, they fell short, something Sooryavanshi accomplished in a single encounter, underlining his immense potential and announcing himself as a future star of the game.
Article Summary: 15-year-old vaibhav sooryavanshi outclassed jasprit bumrah in their very first meeting in the indian premier league. The young left-hander smashed the very first ball he faced from the indian pace spearhead straight over long-on for a stunning six. He scored a blistering 39 off just 14 balls before being dismissed by shardul thakur, caught in the deep.

Article Title: Mohammed Shami: ‘Hum mazdoor aadmi hain’: Mohammed Shami stays grounded despite prolonged India snub
Article Text:
Mohammed Shami (AP Photo)

Grounded in roots, driven by hunger

Eden Gardens: A homecoming with edge

Poll Do you believe that home advantage significantly impacts a player's performance? Definitely Not really

NEW DELHI: Mohammed Shami kept it simple, raw and deeply personal as he returned to his ‘home’ ground, Eden Gardens, ahead of Thursday’s Lucknow Super Giants’ clash against Kolkata Knight Riders — a contest loaded with subplots for the veteran pacer.Fresh off a match-winning spell against Sunrisers Hyderabad, where he delivered a remarkable 2/9 with 18 dot balls, Shami struck a philosophical note, underlining the values that continue to drive him despite injuries and time away from the national side.“Hum mazdoor aadmi hain, humein bas ball daalni hai (we are like labourers, we just have to keep bowling),” Shami quipped, summing up his approach with disarming honesty.The fast bowler reflected on his journey, insisting that staying grounded has been key to his longevity and consistency.“There will be ups and downs in life — injuries and all — but you should never forget your ground-level hard work,” he said. “If you chase too many ‘fancy things’, that becomes your weakness. Nowadays everyone is after social media.”Despite being overlooked for national selection, Shami has continued to deliver in domestic cricket, finishing among the top wicket-takers in the recent Ranji Trophy with 37 wickets at an average of 16.72. His standout 8/90 performance was instrumental in Bengal’s run to the semifinals.“I’m born into a farmer’s family and I’ve not left my roots. As a player, I still have that hunger. If you want to play at that level again, you must have that drive in you,” he added.For Shami, Eden Gardens is more than just a venue — it’s his ‘karm bhoomi’. Having represented Bengal for years, the seasoned pacer acknowledged the advantage of familiarity as he prepares to face KKR.“For me, domestic cricket is as important as any format. I always prioritise it. Even though I was born in Uttar Pradesh, Bengal is my ‘karm bhoomi’,” he said.“Jab tak mere andar khelne ke liye jaan hai, mein Bengal ke liye kheloonga (as long as I have the strength and motivation, I will keep playing for Bengal).”Speaking about the conditions, Shami hinted at a subtle edge. “You always have that home advantage playing at Eden Gardens. You understand the pitch and conditions because you’ve spent so much time there. If I play here against KKR, there will be some advantage for me being a ‘local’.”With KKR still searching for their first win of the season and LSG gaining momentum, Shami’s return to Eden could well tilt the balance.
Article Summary: Mohammed shami returns to his 'home' ground, eden gardens, ahead of thursday’s lucknow super giants’ clash against kolkata knight riders. The veteran pacer struck a philosophical note, underlining the values that continue to drive him despite injuries and time away from the national side.

Article Title: Indian Premier League Standings: IPL 2026 points table after Match 13: Rajasthan Royals beat Mumbai Indians by 27 runs in rain affected clash
Article Text:
RR beat MI by 27 runs (PTI Photo)

Here is updated IPL 2026 Points Table

Position Team Matches (P) Wins (W) Losses (L) No Result (NR) Points Net Run Rate (NRR) 1 RR 3 3 0 0 6 +2.403 2 PBKS 3 2 0 1 5 +0.637 3 RCB 2 2 0 0 4 +2.501 4 DC 2 2 0 0 4 +1.170 5 SRH 3 1 2 0 2 +0.275 6 LSG 2 1 1 0 2 -0.542 7 MI 3 1 2 0 2 -0.715 8 KKR 3 0 2 1 1 -1.964 9 GT 2 0 2 0 0 -0.424 10 CSK 3 0 3 0 0 -2.517



The IPL 2026 season is heating up, and the standings after Match 13 show a clear divide between the early pace-setters and those struggling to find their rhythm.The Rajasthan Royals are the team yet to beat, sitting comfortably at the top with 6 points. Their massive NRR of +2.403 is largely due to their dominant 27-run victory over MI in a rain-shortened Match 13. Mumbai Indians , on the other hand, dropped to seventh place after the defeat. They have played three matches so far, registering just one win while losing twice, and their net run rate of -0.715 reflects an inconsistent start to the season.Punjab Kings is second as they remain unbeaten in two matches and gained a crucial point from a washout against KKR in their 3rd match. They have accumulated five points and boast a net run rate of +0.637. RCB holds the highest NRR in the league, having played one game fewer but winning both their opening fixtures convincingly against Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings.Delhi Capitals are fourth, also unbeaten with two victories from two outings. They have four points and a solid net run rate of +1.170. In fifth place are Sunrisers Hyderabad, who have one win and two defeats from three matches but maintain a positive net run rate of +0.275. Lucknow Super Giants have moved up to sixth, overtaking Mumbai Indians on net run rate. They have one win and one loss from two matches, with two points and a net run rate of -0.542.Further down, Kolkata Knight Riders are placed eighth with one point from three games, including a no result, and a net run rate of -1.964. Gujarat Titans are ninth, yet to secure a win in two matches and carrying a net run rate of -0.424.Chennai Super Kings are in a rare position at the bottom of the table, having lost all three of their opening matches. Their NRR of -2.517 is the worst in the league, leaving them with a massive uphill task to qualify for the playoffs.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals are the team yet to beat, sitting comfortably at the top with 6 points. Mumbai indians have played three matches so far, registering just one win while losing twice, and their net run rate of -0.715 reflects an inconsistent start to the season.

Article Title: Rr Vs Mi: Yesterday IPL Match Result: Jaiswal, Sooryavanshi fire RR to big win over MI
Article Text:
Rajasthan Royals' Yashasvi Jaiswal and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi run between wickets. (ANI Photo)

Openers set the tone in powerplay blitz

Bowlers seal the deal

NEW DELHI: Rajasthan Royals rode on a blistering opening stand from Yashasvi Jaiswal and teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi to beat Mumbai Indians by 27 runs in a rain-hit IPL clash in Guwahati on Tuesday.In a match reduced to 11 overs per side after a delay of two hours and 40 minutes due to persistent rain, Rajasthan posted a commanding 150/3 before restricting Mumbai to 123/9 to register their third consecutive win of the season and climb to the top of the table.Jaiswal came out all guns blazing, smashing four boundaries and a six in the very first over to lay the foundation. At the other end, 15-year-old Sooryavanshi showed no signs of nerves, announcing himself in style by hitting Jasprit Bumrah for a six off his very first ball.The young left-hander continued his fearless approach, striking another six off Bumrah and taking the attack to all bowlers before holing out to Tilak Varma off Shardul Thakur after a stunning 39 off just 14 deliveries.While Sooryavanshi provided the early fireworks, Jaiswal took charge thereafter, bringing up his second successive half-century in just 23 balls. The opener remained unbeaten on 77 off 32 balls, an innings studded with 10 fours and four sixes, as Rajasthan capitalised fully on the shortened format.Mumbai’s chase never really got going after early setbacks. Ryan Rickelton fell in the opening over to Jofra Archer, setting the tone for a collapse.Nandre Burger then removed Suryakumar Yadav cheaply, while Sandeep Sharma trapped Rohit Sharma as Mumbai slumped to 22/3.Leg-spinner Ravi Bishnoi dealt a decisive blow in a single over, dismissing captain Hardik Pandya for a duck and Tilak Varma for 14. With wickets falling at regular intervals, Mumbai failed to build any momentum in the chase.Burger and Sandeep finished with two wickets apiece, ensuring Rajasthan stayed firmly in control throughout the innings.The defeat marked Mumbai’s second loss in three matches, while Rajasthan continued their perfect start to the campaign with three wins on the trot.The action now moves from Guwahati to Delhi, where Delhi Capitals will take on Gujarat Titans in the 14th match of the season at the Arun Jaitley Stadium on Wednesday.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals beat mumbai indians by 27 runs in ipl clash in guwahati. Yashasvi jaiswal and vaibhav sooryavanshi set the tone in powerplay blitz. Rajasthan posted a commanding 150/3 before restricting mumbai to 123/9.

Article Title: DC vs GT IPL Match Preview: Delhi Capitals eye hat-trick of wins to extend promising start
Article Text:
Shubman Gill and Axar Patel (Pic credit: IPL)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

NUMBER GAMES

205 - An unbroken first-wicket partnership between Sai Sudharsan (108*) and Shubman Gill (93*) for Gujarat Titans vs DC at Delhi on May 18, 2025, is the highest by any pair for any wicket in a successful chase in the IPL.

- An unbroken first-wicket partnership between Sai Sudharsan (108*) and Shubman Gill (93*) for Gujarat Titans vs DC at Delhi on May 18, 2025, is the highest by any pair for any wicket in a successful chase in the IPL. 112 - An unbeaten knock off 65 balls by KL Rahul at Delhi on May 18, 2025, is the highest by a Delhi batter vs Gujarat Titans.

- An unbeaten knock off 65 balls by KL Rahul at Delhi on May 18, 2025, is the highest by a Delhi batter vs Gujarat Titans. 2 - Both the defeats suffered by Delhi Capitals to Gujarat Titans last year came while defending a score of 200 or more.

NEW DELHI: There seems to be a spring in every step Delhi Capitals are taking this season. Yes, it might be only two games so far, but with two comprehensive victories, Capitals give the impression of finally translating their potential into performance and look capable of being a team that can go the distance. The Axar Patel-led team will be eager to build on its impressive start and complete a hat-trick of victories when they face a winless Gujarat Titans on their home turf here at the Arun Jaitley Stadium on Wednesday night.The good news for Titans is that their regular skipper Shubman Gill is fit and available to play after missing out the last game against Rajasthan Royals due to muscle spasms. Though ‘Impact Player’ Sameer Rizvi hogged the headlines with two scintillating half-centuries, it’s the performance of the bowlers that set up the twin wins for the Capitals. Their bowling unit appears to be a well-rounded one, with the pace triumvirate of Lungi Ngidi , Mukesh Kumar and T Natarajan making up for the absence of Australian speedster Mitchell Starc. Mukesh seems to have learnt quickly from his seam-bowling partner Ngidi, adopting similarly clever deceptions of pace and length which helped him peg Mumbai Indians back in the previous tie and return with impressive figures of 2/26.“If you manage to get two or three wickets in the Powerplay for around 40 runs, it will be difficult to score over 200 unless you bowl badly at the death. That’s what we have been able to do so far.The presence of Lungi Ngidi has also helped. He has variations and a good slower ball. He is putting the experience of playing in Indian conditions during the World Cup recently to good use. He also provides useful tips to his fellow pacers,” said Capitals bowling coach Munaf Patel.Skipper Axar has not been afraid to bring himself on or use leg-spinning allrounder Vipraj Nigam in the Powerplay. The dexterity of left-arm wrist-spin bowler Kuldeep Yadav has helped the Capitals maintain pressure on their rivals even in the middle overs. The only tinge of worry for the Capitals would be the cheap returns of their top-order batters KL Rahul and Nitish Rana in the first two matches. Rahul, with scores of 0 and 1 and Rana, with 15 and 0, will be keen to repay the faith shown in them by the team management, who have offered them their favoured batting slots.The Titans will be smarting from the defeat against Rajasthan Royals in the previous encounter as they choked during the run chase. Their bowling attack, comprising Mohammed Siraj, Kagiso Rabada, Ashok Sharma, Prasidh Krishna and experienced spinner Rashid Khan looks intimidating on paper but has been guilty of leaking runs.For Titans to come out of their slump, it is imperative that the batting clicks in unison. Hopefully, Gill will be out there leading them from the front.—Stats: Rajesh Kumar
Article Summary: Delhi capitals have won their first two matches in the ipl. Axar patel-led team face gujarat titans on wednesday night. Shubman gill is fit and available to play after missing the last game. The titans will be smarting from the defeat against rajasthan royals.

Article Title: Buffalo Bills: NFL Trade Rumors: Buffalo Bills tipped to make a move for former Las Vegas Raiders' star defender after record breaking season
Article Text:
Buffalo Bills tipped to make a move for former Las Vegas Raiders' star defender after record breaking season.(Image via X)

Buffalo Bills linked to former Las Vegas Raiders’ veteran, Devin White, amid his mixed performance in the last few seasons



The Buffalo Bills have been a force to be reckoned with in the last few seasons even though the team experienced a heartbreaking loss against the Denver Broncos in the Divisional Round in 2025.As the Buffalo Bills gear up for the new season, it seems the team is now being tipped to acquire a former Las Vegas Raiders’ veteran.A few hours ago, the Buffalo Bills’ Jamie Malloy of FanSided opened up on why signing Devin White could be beneficial for the team in the new season.Buffalo Bills’ Jamie Malloy noted, “At the beginning of his career, Devin White was a menace on the field for the Tampa Bay Buccaneers…Since then, he’s lost a little of that toughness in him that once made him a nightmare to play against.”Buffalo Bills’ Jamie Malloy added, “He’s still a consistent and reliable tackler…The Super Bowl LV Champion with the Buccaneers still has plenty of time left in his career to return to the 2020 version of himself…”Buffalo Bills’ Jamie Malloy continued, “What better place to do it than in Orchard Park, with the Bills playing in a brand-new stadium with a strong defense that’s tailor-made for him to showcase his abilities.”While this has sparked a debate, the Buffalo Bills have stayed away from the speculations.The former Las Vegas Raiders’ star player, Devin White, dominated the field in the last season after a pretty disappointing season in 2024.In the last season, Devin White set a franchise record in the Las Vegas Raiders as he recorded 174 total tackles (95 solo), ranking third in the NFL.Across 17 games, Devin White ended the season with 2.5 sacks, 11 tackles for loss, 1 interception, and 1 forced fumble.Though Devin White impressed everyone with his performance in 2025, the 2024 season proved to be a tough time for him.The former Las Vegas Raiders’ linebacker had initially signed a deal with the Philadelphia Eagles for the 2024 season but was released from the team without playing a single snap.Devin White later signed a one year contract with the Houston Texans as he appeared in just 7 games.The star player majorly acted as a backup in the 2024 season as he ended the season with 19 tackles (15 solo).While his performance in the 2025 season proved his worth, for now, all eyes are on where Devin White ends up next as many expect him to bounce back on the field.
Article Summary: Buffalo bills tipped to make a move for former las vegas raiders' star defender after record breaking season. Bills’ jamie malloy of fansided opened up on why signing devin white could be beneficial for the team in the new season.

Article Title: Ishowspeed Wwe Debut: IShowSpeed set for WWE debut at WrestleMania 42 in six-man tag match
Article Text:
Image Via Instagram

IShowSpeed ready for first WWE match at WrestleMania 42

“Speed Goes Pro”

“cursed”







The world of wrestling and streaming is about to come together in a big way. IShowSpeed is all set to make his WWE in-ring debut at WrestleMania 42. The event will take place on April 18 and April 19, 2026. Fans are already very excited to see him step into the ring for a real match. While Speed has appeared on WWE shows before, this will be his first full match.Over the past few weeks, WWE has been building this moment on its weekly shows. Now it is official that Speed will team up with Logan Paul and Austin Theory. They will go against The Usos and LA Knight in a six-man tag team match. This match is expected to be fun, fast, and full of big moments.Even though this is his first proper match, Speed has already been part of many WWE moments. Fans remember when he got hit with an RKO by Randy Orton and when Bron Breakker knocked him down. These clips went viral and got millions of views online. He also trained with Orton for hisseries, which helped him learn some basic moves.Still, a real match is very different. Speed will be in the ring with trained wrestlers, so he will not have to do everything alone.This could help him perform better. However, things may not go perfectly. It has been shown that he is not fully comfortable teaming with Logan Paul and Austin Theory. Because of this, there could be mistakes or funny moments during the match.There is also an ongoing storyline involving Danhausen. HeSpeed earlier, and since then, Speed has been facing bad luck. This story may continue at WrestleMania, and Danhausen could get involved during the match.In the end, all eyes will be on Speed as he enters the ring for his first official match. No matter the result, this is a big moment for him. WrestleMania 42 could be the start of a new journey for IShowSpeed in WWE.
Article Summary: Ishowspeed is all set to make his wwe in-ring debut at wrestlemania 42. The event will take place on april 18 and april 19, 2026. Speed will team up with logan paul and austin theory in a six-man tag team match.

Article Title: Stephen Curry: “I don’t have bad days”: Stephen Curry opens up about how Ayesha Curry and kids changed his life
Article Text:
Stephen Curry opens up about how Ayesha Curry and kids changed his lif.(Image via Getty Images)

Stephen Curry opens up about how the presence of Ayesha Curry and their children changed his life for the better



Why is Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, often trolled for her comments on their high profile marriage?



Stephen Curry, the Golden State Warriors’ star player, has had a relatively perfect life with his wife, Ayesha Curry , and their four young children.While both Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry prefer to keep their children out of the spotlight, the NBA legend opened up how having a family to come back home to makes him feel every day of his life is perfect.A few years ago, in a heartfelt interview, the four time NBA champion Stephen Curry opened up about his life as he said, “It puts everything into perspective. I don’t ever have a bad day knowing when I go home, I have my wife and daughter to enjoy life with…”The Golden State Warriors’ star player added, “There’s nothing more gratifying than coming home and spending time with your daughter and your wife and just enjoying what God has blessed me with…”Stephen Curry continued, “I don’t even know what I used to do with my free time…Cause now it’s all about Riley. So, it’s a good thing that’s going on”.Over the last few years, the NBA legend Stephen Curry has proven to be a pretty committed husband and a loving father.While his wife, popular entrepreneur and chef, Ayesha Curry, have often praised him in public, some of her statements and remarks about their marriage have often sparked outrage among fans.For the unversed, a few months ago, Ayesha Cueey made an appearance on a podcast where she opened up about how she never planned to marry or have children of her own as she wanted her complete focus to be on her career.But when the popular chef met Stephen Curry, things changed and the two fell in love quickly.This led to them getting married in their early 20s and starting to have children soon.Though this seemed as a honest confession about her life, Ayesha Curry’s remarks were taken out of context as fans labelled her as being “disrespectful” towards her husband, the NBA legend Stephen Curry.This led to immense hate but the high profile couple maintained their fair share of distance from the drama and refused to comment on it.
Article Summary: Stephen curry opens up about how ayesha curry and kids changed his lif. Curry: “i don’t even know what i used to do with my free time…cause now it’s all about riley. So, it's a good thing that's going on”

Article Title: Sheldon Keefe: New Jersey Devils head coach Sheldon Keefe faces uncertainty over his future following GM Tom Fitzgerald's departure
Article Text:
New Jersey Devils face uncertainty after GM Fitzgerald’s departure (Image via Reuters Photo)

New Jersey Devils face uncertainty as GM Tom Fitzgerald’s exit leaves Keefe’s future in question

The New Jersey Devils are entering a period of uncertainty following the departure of general manager Tom Fitzgerald, a move that has created a sense of uncertainty over the future of the club and the head coach, Sheldon Keefe. According to reports, Fitzgerald was relieved from his duties after nearly six seasons at the helm of the team.With the Devils struggling to meet expectations and likely to miss the playoffs this year, this decision marks a significant shift in leadership for the franchise, which now faces a crucial offseason as it looks to reestablish itself as a contender for the upcoming season. According to the NHL , in 77 games, the Devils had a 40-34-3 record, scoring 83 points. However, attention has quickly turned to the team's head coach, Keefe, whose position appears increasingly uncertain.With the front office now being vacant, attention has quickly turned to New Jersey Devils head coach Sheldon Keefe , whose position appears increasingly uncertain as Fitzgerald was relieved of his duties after nearly six seasons at the helm of the New Jersey Devils. Announcing the general manager's exit, the team took to X/Twitter and stated, "New Jersey Devils Managing Partner David Blitzer announced today that Tom Fitzgerald will depart the organization."As per reports, a change in general manager often leads to a broader organizational reset, with incoming leadership typically preferring to appoint their new coaching staff. And with a disappointing season this year, this raises the question about whether Keefe will remain behind the bench or move forward like Fitzgerald.Speaking about the situation, head coach Keefe stated, “It’s not a good feeling to hear the news. Not a better feeling today, frankly. He further added, “I certainly hope to be a part of the solution here. Obviously, they’ve got some decisions to make on who the new general manager and what the leadership of the team looks like. ... I’ll be a part of that discussion and evaluation. It’s not something I feel good about with the situation that we’ve put the team in here. ”As per reports, Keefe coached the Devils to the playoffs a year ago, bowing out in five games in the first round, also after Hughes was lost for the season following shoulder surgery. However, it is important to note that in seven seasons in the league, this is the first spring Keefe has not taken someone to the playoffs.The Devils’ inconsistent performances and failure to secure a playoff position have led the management to take stringent measures regarding an organizational reset. Moreover, the team’s campaign has been further complicated by injuries and underwhelming results, highlighting structural issues that may require bigger changes to come back stronger the next season.
Article Summary: New jersey devils are entering a period of uncertainty following the departure of general manager tom fitzgerald. Fitzgerald was relieved from his duties after nearly six seasons at the helm of the team. With the front office now being vacant, attention has quickly turned to new jersey devils head coach sheldon keefe.

Article Title: Carlos Alcaraz: Laila Hasanovic spotted watching Carlos Alcaraz at Monte Carlo as Jannik Sinner rivalry takes unexpected twist
Article Text:
Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner (Image Via Getty)

Carlos Alcaraz dominates Sebastian Baez as Laila Hasanovic watches while Jannik Sinner starts strong and eyes top spot

It was one of those moments that made people pause. Laila Hasanovic, who is dating Jannik Sinner, was seen in the stands during Carlos Alcaraz’s match at the Monte Carlo Masters. What made it interesting was simple. She was not watching Sinner at that time. She was watching his biggest rival.This happened during Alcaraz’s opening match at the 2026 Monte Carlo Masters. The World No. 1 looked sharp as he beat Sebastian Baez in straight sets, 6-1, 6-3. The match did not last long, just around 70 minutes, but the camera catching Hasanovic in the crowd quickly became a talking point among fans.Alcaraz looked fully in control from the first game. He broke Baez’s serve five times and only slipped once on his own serve. It was a clean and confident performance, showing why he is still leading the rankings. Since he had a first-round bye, this was his first match of the tournament, and he made it count.But the story around the match was not just about the score. Hasanovic’s presence stood out. Earlier in the day, she had already watched Sinner play his match. He defeated Ugo Humbert 6-3, 6-0 in a one-sided contest. That made her appearance later in Alcaraz’s match even more noticeable.Right now, Sinner looks in strong form. He came into Monte Carlo after winning big titles in Indian Wells and Miami. Even though he is ranked No. 2, many feel he is playing at a higher level at the moment.After his win, Alcaraz spoke honestly about the rankings battle with Sinner. He said, “I am going to lose No. 1 in the world at some point. I do not know if it is going to be at this tournament or another one. I am defending a lot of points that are going to be really difficult to defend. Even if I defend them, Jannik is going to add some points.”He added, “For me the No. 1 spot is not in my mind right now. I am just trying to feel the best way on clay courts and see how the clay season goes.”Looking ahead, Alcaraz will next face either Tomas Martin Etcheverry or Terence Atmane in the third round. On the other side, Sinner is set to play either Francisco Cerundolo or Tomas Machac.So while both players are moving forward in the tournament, a simple moment in the stands has quietly added another layer to this growing rivalry.
Article Summary: Carlos alcaraz beat sebastian baez 6-1, 6-3 in the first round of the monte carlo masters. Laila hasanovic, who is dating jannik sinner, was seen in the crowd. She was not watching sinner at that time.

Article Title: Stefanos Tsitsipas: “He’s going to sink”: Stefanos Tsitsipas faces harsh reality as Benoit Maylin reacts to Monte Carlo Masters defeat
Article Text:
Stefanos Tsitsipas faces harsh reality as Benoit Maylin reacts to Monte Carlo Masters defeat (Image via Getty)

Benoit Maylin compares Stefanos Tsitsipas to Titanic after Monte Carlo Masters loss



Benoit Maylin questions Stefanos Tsitsipas’ confidence and body language after loss



Stefanos Tsitsipas walked into the Monte Carlo Masters hoping to restart his season. Instead, things went wrong very quickly. The former World No. 3 lost in the first round to Francisco Cerundolo in straight sets, 5-7, 4-6. This loss is not just about one match. It shows a bigger problem. Stefanos Tsitsipas, once one of the strongest players on clay, is now struggling badly. His ranking has dropped outside the top 60, which is a big fall for a player who used to fight for titles.Right after the match, a well-known French tennis insider, Benoit Maylin, shared a very strong and worrying opinion. His words quickly caught attention because they described Tsitsipas’ current form in a very harsh way.Speaking on Sans Filet, Benoit Maylin did not hold back. He compared Stefanos Tsitsipas’ situation to something sinking slowly with no way out.He said:“Tsitsipas is like the Titanic. We know he’s going to sink, and he is. It’s completely absurd that he’s dropped out of the top 60. And if there’s one tournament where we say, ‘Stefanos, give us back the glory days of your career,’ it’s Monte Carlo. Since 2022, he’s always been at least in the quarterfinals; he loves playing there, that’s where we see all his brilliance, but Tsitsipas isn’t there anymore.”This comparison hit hard because Monte Carlo has always been a happy place for Tsitsipas. He has won the title there multiple times and usually plays his best tennis on these courts. But this time, things looked very different. He could not control the match, and Francisco Cerundolo stayed calm and took his chances well.Benoit Maylin did not just talk about results. He also focused on how Stefanos Tsitsipas looked on the court. According to him, the Greek player did not show belief or energy.He said:“I don’t even see Tsitsipas anymore, or maybe it’s an alien that’s taken over his body. It’s not him. There’s no conviction, his head is always down, his shoulders are hunched. There’s no belief. It’s frightening. He’s completely sinking, and I don’t see how he’s not going to drown.”These words show serious concern. In tennis, confidence is very important. When a player loses belief, it affects every shot and every decision.Right now, Stefanos Tsitsipas is not just losing matches. He looks unsure and low on confidence, which is making things even harder for him.
Article Summary: Stefanos tsitsipas lost in the first round of the monte carlo masters to francisco cerundolo in straight sets, 5-7, 4-6. The former world no. 3 is struggling badly and has dropped out of the top 60. French tennis insider, benoit maylin, compared his situation to something sinking slowly with no way out.

Article Title: Brady Tkachuk: New York Rangers have slim chances to acquire Brady Tkachuk and Auston Matthews despite link rumors
Article Text:
New York Rangers face slim odds of landing Brady Tkachuk, Auston Matthews despite trade links (Image Via Getty Images)

New York Rangers’ dream to land elite NHL stars have slims chances to happen despite potential links

Watch Capitals vs. Rangers | NHL Highlights | April 05, 2026 Capitals vs. Rangers | NHL Highlights | April 05, 2026

The New York Rangers have reportedly been linked with superstar forwards Brady Tkachuk and Auston Matthews as part of potential blockbuster moves, as they are trying to bring in some promising hockey late in this season, after sinking to the bottom of the Eastern Conference standings. However, the club has slim chances to acquire Brady Tkachuk and Auston Matthews due to multiple valid reasons.According to recent reports, the Rangers are exploring high-impact roster changes following a disappointing season, with elite talent like Tkachuk and Matthews emerging as dream trade targets. However, the situation is far more complex than it appears.After a disappointing season, the New York Rangers are currently eyeing a blockbuster addition, but their chances of landing elite NHL talents appear to be increasingly unlikely despite growing speculation. However, recent reports have linked the Rangers with high-profile forwards such as Brady Tkachuk and Auston Matthews, creating excitement about a potential roster overhaul.The move is seen as an attempt to revive the team’s fortunes after a disappointing run that has left them near the bottom of the Eastern Conference standings.However, the chances are quite slim to land these elite NHL stars due to several factors, like the Rangers not having enough to give up, and teams won't trade a star like Brad Tkachuk or Auston Matthews for a small return.They would want top young players, big draft picks, and maybe extra contracts. The Rangers right now don’t have that kind of “big package” ready, so other teams have more to offer.As per reports, Ottawa still sees Tkachuk as a core player and says he’s staying, even though his contract is running down. However, Auston Matthews, who is still absent for the season due to his MCL injury, is expected to evaluate his future during the offseason, with reports suggesting a potential decision based on the Toronto Maple Leafs’ current situation as they are going through a retooling phase.Besides, Matthews is under contract through the 2027-28 season on a four-year contract. However, his full no-movement clause gives him complete control over any potential move, which would make any trade move complex.This implies that for now, the links to Tkachuk and Matthews are mostly rumor and wishful thinking. To upgrade the club, the Rangers are more likely to look for smaller upgrades or more real trade deals this summer, rather than trying to land these elite NHL players.
Article Summary: New york rangers have reportedly been linked with superstar forwards brady tkachuk and auston matthews as part of potential blockbuster moves. Rangers are exploring high-impact roster changes following a disappointing season. However, the chances are quite slim to land these elite nhl stars due to several factors, like the rangers not having enough to give up.

Article Title: Frances Tiafoe: Frances Tiafoe breaks silence after Houston loss to Tommy Paul as Ayan Broomfield’s reaction grabs attention
Article Text:
Frances Tiafoe and Tommy Paul (Image Via Getty)

Frances Tiafoe responds after Houston loss while Ayan Broomfield shares love and Tommy Paul edges thriller win

It was a tough night for Frances Tiafoe in Houston, but what followed after the match caught just as much attention. After losing a close semi-final to Tommy Paul, Tiafoe didn’t disappear quietly. Instead, he shared a calm and honest message, showing he is still focused and moving forward.The match ended in a tight three-set battle, 7-5, 4-6, 7-6(7), during the U.S. Men’s Clay Court Championship. It was a painful result, especially because Tiafoe had been so strong at this event in recent years. But even in that moment, he chose to stay grounded, and someone close to him made sure he felt supported.Soon after the match, Tiafoe posted on Instagram with a message that felt simple but meaningful. He wrote, “In my own lane… At my own pace… Running my own race. Love you H-Town #HomeAwayFromHome.” It was not about the loss. It was more about staying steady and believing in his journey.His girlfriend, Ayan Broomfield, quickly reacted. She shared his post on her own story and added love emojis. She also posted a picture of the two together, showing support in a quiet but clear way. It was a small moment, but fans noticed it.During his time in Houston, Tiafoe had shared glimpses of his days off the court too. He posted photos of getting a haircut before the match, playing basketball with friends, and spending time with Broomfield. In one photo, the couple wore matching pastel outfits, which gave fans a lighter moment during a tense tournament week.On the court, though, the match against Tommy Paul was intense from start to finish. Paul held his nerve in the final set tiebreak to secure the win. For Tiafoe, it meant he would not reach the final this time, after making deep runs in previous years, including winning the title in 2023.Despite the result, there is still a lot of belief around him. In a recent conversation with journalist Blair Henley, she described him as someone who connects naturally with fans. She said, “He was in the media room, just gathering the whole team around to take a picture with him.” It showed the kind of energy he brings beyond just tennis.Tiafoe has also admitted that this confidence did not come overnight. Earlier in his career, he struggled to open up, but over time, he has become more comfortable and expressive.For now, the loss in Houston may hurt, but his reaction shows where his mindset is. He is not stuck on one result. He is already looking ahead.
Article Summary: Frances tiafoe lost 7-5, 4-6, 7-6(7), to tommy paul in the u.s. men’s clay court championship semi-final in houston. After the match, he posted a message on instagram that showed he is still focused and moving forward. His girlfriend, ayan broomfield, also shared a picture of the two together.

Article Title: Michigan Wolverines: Dave Portnoy goes wild as Michigan Wolverines win national championship and end decades long title drought
Article Text:
Dave Portnoy (Image Via Getty)

Dave Portnoy celebrates Michigan Wolverines win while Elliot Cadeau leads the charge and Barack Obama reacts

The moment the final buzzer rang, it wasn’t just the players celebrating. One of Michigan’s most famous fans completely lost it too. Dave Portnoy went wild as Michigan sealed a 69-63 win over UConn to lift the national championship. It happened on Monday night, ending a title drought that had lasted since 1989.Portnoy was inside the arena watching every second. He looked tense during the closing minutes as UConn kept pushing back. But the second Michigan confirmed the win, his mood flipped instantly. Within minutes, he was online, shouting, celebrating, and making sure everyone knew how big this moment was for Michigan fans.Portnoy jumped onto X and shared his emotions without holding back. He said, “This school… I tried to tell people! It does not matter what the sport is. Basketball, football, it is the best sports program in the country! UConn played their hearts out, they would not go away. But not against Michigan.”He didn’t stop there. In another video, he added, “Now get some sleep, we have to go win hockey next weekend. It never stops when you are part of Michigan. Who has it better than us? Nobody.”At the same time, celebrations were not limited to him. Videos from Ann Arbor showed fans flooding the streets, cheering loudly and celebrating a long-awaited title.On the court, Michigan had strong performances. Elliot Cadeau stood out with 19 points, along with two assists and three rebounds. He controlled the game when it mattered the most. UConn tried to fight back through Alex Karaban, who scored 17 points, and Tarris Reed, who added 13. But Michigan held its ground.Yaxel Lendeborg had a tough night. He was dealing with a foot injury and even said during halftime, “I feel awful. I feel super weak right now. I cannot make anything. I am trying to push through because it is a championship game.” Still, he managed to contribute after the break and helped his team close out the win.This victory also made history. Michigan became the first team to win the title while starting five transfer players. It also marked the first championship for a Big Ten team since 2000.Even former US President Barack Obama joined in. He posted, “Congratulations to Coach Dusty May, Elliot Cadeau, and Michigan Basketball on winning their first title since 1989. This team dominated the tournament from start to finish. Well deserved.”
Article Summary: Dave portnoy went wild as michigan sealed a 69-63 win over uconn to lift the national championship. Michigan became the first team to win the title while starting five transfer players. It also marked the first championship for a big ten team since 2000.

Article Title: Drake Maye: Drake Maye’s New England Patriots strongly linked to $81M New York Giants nose tackle
Article Text:
Drake Maye’s New England Patriots strongly linked to $81M New York Giants nose tackle (Image via Getty: New York Giants logo and New England Patriots logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Drake Maye ’s Patriots tied to Giants DT Dexter Lawrence

Trade Package:

New York could acquire Christian Barmore for losing Dexter Lawrence

New York HC John Harbaugh and GM Joe Schoen talk about Dexter Lawrence

New York Giants long-time nose tackle Dexter Lawrence signed a four-year, $87M contract extension in 2023, which included a $22M signing bonus, $60M in guaranteed money, and a $21M average annual salary. As per Spotrac, he is scheduled to make $18.5M base salary and a $500K workout bonus while carrying a $26.9M cap hit and a $13.9M dead cap value in 2026.In 2024, his contract was restructured by converting $10M base salary into a signing bonus. However, he has no guaranteed money left on the final two terms of the contract [2026 and 2027].As a result, a new contract was negotiated. But after several failed attempts at creating a new deal with New York, Lawrence has requested a trade, just two weeks before the draft. He will not be participating in the team’s upcoming voluntary offseason workouts.This allows analysts to involve him in a trade package for his future franchise. And so, Bleacher Report’s Gary Davenport suggests a trade with the Drake Maye-led New England Patriots. What does it contain? Let’s find out.New England receives Lawrence, whereas New York receives a 2026 second-round pick, a 2026 fourth-round pick, and a 2026 sixth-round pick in return for losing a valuable defensive lineman.The analyst notes that the Patriots have never shown they can be aggressive in defensive acquisitions, but if they could acquire the three-time Pro Bowler, they would form the league’s best defensive front alongside in-house Milton Williams and Christian Barmore.A page from their history? Last offseason, they signed several veterans: linebacker Robert Spillane, edge rusher Harold Landry III, defensive tackle Milton Williams, and cornerback Carlton Davis III. Result? They entered the Super Bowl.It looks like they are carrying forward the same approach this offseason. They have so far signed Chicago Bears safety Kevin Byard and Baltimore Ravens linebacker Dre’Mont Jones. This only shows how hungry they are for another Big Game appearance.If they wish to continue this pattern, they could easily bring in a proven interior defender on a new deal. This could make both parties content. Lawrence signs a new contract, and New England strengthens its defense.The analyst also suggests that the Giants could ask for Barmore in return, but the Patriots may want to continue with him.Barmore was facing domestic assault and battery charges stemming from an alleged Aug. 2025 altercation with his then-girlfriend. But the charges were dropped by the Massachusetts prosecutors just two days before the new league year [March 9]. They cited the case was “not viable for prosecution” due to the “current state of evidence” and the complainant’s reluctance to proceed.Anyhow, coming back to Giants tackle, how good was he on the gridiron? He had a down year in 2025 season, recorded career-low 31 tackles and half-sack. However, his PFF grades were great [except for run-defense grade].The defensive tackle earned a 75.6 overall PFF grade for the 2025 season, which ranked 9th among 134 qualified interior defensive linemen. His PFF pass-rush grade was 84.5, ranked 7th among others. His PFF run-defense grade was 57.0, ranking 56th. He recorded 34 total pressures, 27 hurries, 0 forced fumbles, and 7 hits.Giants head coach John Harbaugh spoke very highly about the defensive lineman in February: “How important is he? Really important. He’s super, super important. He’s a cornerstone football player, not really a cornerstone, more like the middle stone. He’s right in the middle. He’s a very big stone, and he’s a very active, athletic one.”If he is so important, then a contract could have been adjusted, but it wasn’t. Anyhow, New York general manager Joe Schoen did give everyone a hint about the same back at the NFL’s Annual Meeting in Phoenix. A reporter asked Schoen about the possibility of adjusting Lawrence’s contract.The GM said: “We have a lot of those conversations as we continue to build or open up money. Where can we do it? Could we do an extension with other players? What does that look like? So, we’re always having those conversations. Not only with Dexter, but with other players. That’s part of our mapping out the offseason and planning.”The planning probably reached no fruition. Or, in short, nothing in favor of the nose tackle. So, he’s requested a trade. And Bleacher Report’s Gary Davenport suggests the Drake Maye-led New England Patriots.As for the Patriots’ cap space, it is $35.5M, according to OverTheCap. Williams and Barmore occupy $45.6M of their $300M cap this year.Spotrac estimates Lawrence is likely to sign a three-year, $81M contract, resulting in a $27.2M average annual salary.So, would the New York All-Pro defensive tackle be traded to New England? Only time will tell…
Article Summary: Drake maye’s new england patriots strongly linked to $81m new york giants nose tackle. Lawrence signed a four-year, $87m contract extension in 2023, which included a $22m signing bonus, $60m in guaranteed money, and a $21m average annual salary. Dexter lawrence has requested a trade from the new york jets.

Article Title: Jon Cooper Nhl: Coach Jon Cooper calls out NHL officials after Pontus Holmberg's injury during Tampa Bay Lightning and Buffalo Sabres match
Article Text:
Buffalo Sabres center Tage Thompson, front, checks Tampa Bay Lightning right wing Pontus Holmberg, back, during the first period of an NHL hockey game Monday, April 6, 2026, in Buffalo, N.Y. (AP Photo/Jeffrey T. Barnes)

Tampa Bay Lightning coach Jon Cooper addresses Pontus Holmberg's injury during Sabres game



The fight between the Tampa Bay Lightning and Buffalo Sabres was more than just about the score. A scary event on the ice took away from the game's competitive edge. What should have been a normal series of events quickly became a big topic of conversation around the league.During the game, forward Pontus Holmberg got a scary injury when he hit his face against an open penalty box gate, this mistake is thought to have been caused by poor officiating off the ice. The event quickly worried players, coaches, and fans, bringing up new questions about safety rules during games.Jon Cooper didn't hold back when he talked about what happened after the game. The head coach of the Tampa Bay Lightning openly criticized the officials in charge of the penalty box, saying that they should face serious consequences for making such a mistake. His comments showed both anger and worry about the safety of the players.Cooper stressed that the injury could have been avoided completely, citing what he called negligence in keeping the game conditions right. He asked if the official in question should keep doing the job, which showed how serious the mistake was. His comments quickly became a hot topic in NHL news discussions.Cooper wasn't happy with the way the game was officiated in general, in addition to the injury itself.He said that too many penalties messed up the natural flow of the game, which took away from the intensity and entertainment value that fans expect from an NHL game. He says that too much interference from officials can hurt both teams and the experience of watching the game.Since then, the event has sparked bigger discussions in the National Hockey League community. Fans and analysts are arguing about whether off-ice officials should be held to stricter standards, especially when it comes to player safety.The Tampa Bay Lightning were even more upset because they lost, this made the night even more disappointing. This episode reminds us how important every job is as more NHL news comes out. To keep the game fair and safe.
Article Summary: Pontus holmberg got a scary injury when he hit his face against an open penalty box gate, this mistake is thought to have been caused by poor officiating off the ice. Head coach of the tampa bay lightning openly criticized the officials in charge of the penalty box, saying that they should face serious consequences for making such a mistake.
